news-global-econ.title: Adani firms extend rally to recoup losses sparked by Hindenburg
news-global-econ.description: All nine Adani stocks rose Wednesday, led by a 13% surge in Adani Total Gas Ltd. Adani Power Ltd. extended its record rally, taking gains this year to nearly 75%

news-global-econ.title: Treasure hunters find biggest Viking coin hoard in country's history: 'Without parallel'
news-global-econ.description: Norway's largest Viking coin hoard features 2,970 silver coins minted in England and Germany, reflecting foreign influence on the late Viking economy.

news-global-econ.title: Sleep doctor reveals the brutal health downside of daylight saving time
news-global-econ.description: Dr. Wendy Troxel says permanent daylight saving time is not supported by science and could harm sleep, mental health and safety for millions of Americans.

news-global-econ.title: Muslim Faithful Stone the Devil in Final Hajj Ritual as Mass Animal Slaughter Begins
news-global-econ.description:
Muslim faithful took part in the climactic ritual of the annual hajj pilgrimage on Wednesday, symbolically stoning the devil near Mecca.
